---
title: "TN Breast Cancer scRNA-seq Analysis"
author: "Sherry Ali"
date: "2025-07-30"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(Seurat)
library(SingleR)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(celldex)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)

---

## 🧬 **1. Project Overview**

```r
```{r}
# This R Markdown performs a complete scRNA-seq workflow on two 10x Genomics
# datasets derived from the same invasive ductal carcinoma patient.
# The datasets differ only in throughput:
#   - Low-throughput (LT): ~750 cells
#   - High-throughput (HT): ~7,500 cells

---

## 📥 **2. Load Data**

Replace the file paths with **relative paths** once you upload your `.h5` files:

```r
```{r load-data}
LT.data <- Read10X_h5("data/Breast_Cancer_3p_LT_raw_feature_bc_matrix.h5")
HT.data <- Read10X_h5("data/7500Breast_Cancer_3p_raw_feature_bc_matrix.h5")

LT <- CreateSeuratObject(LT.data, project = "LT", min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
HT <- CreateSeuratObject(HT.data, project = "HT", min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)

---

## 🧹 **3. Quality Control**

```r
```{r qc}
LT[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(LT, pattern = "^MT-")
HT[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(HT, pattern = "^MT-")

VlnPlot(LT, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"))
VlnPlot(HT, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), cols = "red")

LT <- subset(LT, subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & nFeature_RNA < 8000 & percent.mt < 20)
HT <- subset(HT, subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & nFeature_RNA < 9000 & percent.mt < 20)

---

## 🔧 **4. Normalization & Feature Selection**

```r
```{r normalize}
LT <- NormalizeData(LT)
HT <- NormalizeData(HT)

LT <- FindVariableFeatures(LT, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)
HT <- FindVariableFeatures(HT, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)

---

## 📉 **5. Scaling, PCA, and UMAP**

```r
```{r pca-umap}
LT <- ScaleData(LT)
HT <- ScaleData(HT)

LT <- RunPCA(LT)
HT <- RunPCA(HT)

LT <- RunUMAP(LT, dims = 1:6)
HT <- RunUMAP(HT, dims = 1:6)

DimPlot(LT, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE)
DimPlot(HT, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, cols = "red")

---

## 🔍 **6. Clustering & Marker Detection**

```r
```{r clustering}
LT <- FindNeighbors(LT, dims = 1:6)
LT <- FindClusters(LT, resolution = 1.0)

HT <- FindNeighbors(HT, dims = 1:6)
HT <- FindClusters(HT, resolution = 1.0)

LT.markers <- FindAllMarkers(LT, only.pos = TRUE)
HT.markers <- FindAllMarkers(HT, only.pos = TRUE)

---

## 🧬 **7. Cell Type Annotation (SingleR)**

```r
```{r singler}
ref <- celldex::HumanPrimaryCellAtlasData()

LT.sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(LT)
HT.sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(HT)

LT.labels <- SingleR(test = LT.sce, ref = ref, labels = ref$label.main)
HT.labels <- SingleR(test = HT.sce, ref = ref, labels = ref$label.main)

LT$SingleR_main <- LT.labels$labels
HT$SingleR_main <- HT.labels$labels

DimPlot(LT, group.by = "SingleR_main", label = TRUE)
DimPlot(HT, group.by = "SingleR_main", label = TRUE)

---

## 🧪 **8. Session Info**

```r
```{r session}
sessionInfo()
